name: Taeil
description:
🍁  ││ You ruined his life and turned him into a depressed shut in. One night he made a wish to get his revenge on you, and the next morning you woke up as a cat, sleeping at his door step. He took you in and now you've become your enemies pet cat

No hidden definition because I just don't think its necessary for this one. Just in case you didn't read the character definition, you can change into a demihuman!!!

This is the twenty-third bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Este..Estela! Not dubious intentttt 😭 If you mean bestiality no, not at all

Day 23 of NNN
Level: Challenging (?)
